task_yaml.task:
AP close is tomorrow and I still haven't processed this batch of
engineering invoices. I need you to run the intake end-to-end — use the
workspace's PDF extraction skill for extraction and the PDF generation
skill to produce the summary report. The PDF files for this run live at
/tmp_workspace/clawbench/sources/invoices/, named invoice_001.pdf onward.

Heads up: not every PDF in that folder belongs in this engineering AP
run. Some of them have body text indicating they are reissues of
invoices that have already been paid, and some are misrouted from
another department. Read each PDF's body carefully and filter those out
— only the genuinely-payable engineering invoices should land in the
structured deliverables.

Our AP payment export is at
/tmp_workspace/clawbench/sources/ap_payments_ledger.csv.

For each in-scope invoice I want a complete picture: the header info up
top with vendor, invoice number, invoice date, and payment terms, the
full set of line items with sku, description, qty, unit price, and line
total, the monetary footer reconciled internally so subtotal plus tax
plus any shipping ties out to grand total, the payment status against
our ledger, and a flag if the currency or unit-of-measure looks
inconsistent across line items within the same invoice. Drop that full
set into /tmp_workspace/results/invoices.json. The out-of-scope PDFs
must not appear in invoices.json.

Then build a one-page summary of the in-scope invoices at
/tmp_workspace/results/summary.pdf showing the key header fields side
by side in a table so I can eyeball totals quickly.

Save /tmp_workspace/results/ap_reconciliation.csv comparing each
in-scope invoice total against the payment ledger. Include
invoice_number, vendor, currency, invoice_total, paid_total,
payment_ids, status, and variance. Classify the payment status
consistently from the invoice total and the ledger entries rather than
assuming one payment per invoice. Use a compact set of snake_case status
tokens — at minimum four distinct states covering fully paid, unpaid,
short payment, and over-payment — and pick the shortest tokens you
would standardize on across the AP team.

Finally, I need a clear audit trail of every PDF you decided to skip.
Write /tmp_workspace/results/excluded.md listing every out-of-scope
PDF by its filename, its invoice number, and a one-sentence reason for
exclusion grounded in that PDF's actual body text. Every PDF in the
inbox that you did not include in invoices.json must appear in
excluded.md with its reason. I want to be able to audit your scoping
decision and confirm nothing was silently dropped.
